nav.taxiPoolDesc: Share a ride, save up to 50%

footer.tagline: The app that puts road professionals back at the center of urban mobility.

home.metaTitle: Book a Taxi in France — Licensed Drivers, Fixed Prices
home.metaDescription: Book a taxi in seconds. Licensed drivers, regulated fares, dedicated bus lanes, available 24/7 in 50 French cities. Fixed prices guaranteed before booking.
home.heroSubtitle: The comfort and safety of regulated professionals, with simple and transparent pricing.
home.servicesSubtitle: Two ways to travel with TaxiNeo
home.serviceFixedDesc: Book your taxi in seconds. Fixed fare guaranteed, no surprises.
home.servicePoolDesc: Share your ride with other passengers. Cheaper, more responsible.
home.step1Desc: Enter your pickup and drop-off points. The app instantly shows you available taxis nearby.
home.step2Desc: Compare fares, read reviews and select the driver that suits you. Fixed price, no surprises.
home.step3Desc: Track your driver's approach in real time, get in and enjoy. Payment is automatic via the app.
home.feature1Desc: Only licensed taxi drivers, trained and with expert knowledge of their city. Your safety is our priority.
home.feature2Desc: No more surge pricing during peak demand. Enjoy the stability of government-regulated fares.
home.feature3Desc: As official taxis, our vehicles use bus lanes to save you precious time.
home.testimonial1: No more fare surprises. With TaxiNeo, I know exactly what I'll pay, even during rush hour. The driver knew the way perfectly.
home.testimonial2: I use TaxiNeo for all my business trips. The Business option with automatic billing saves me so much time. Impeccable service.
home.testimonial3: As a mom, safety is essential. Knowing that TaxiNeo drivers are licensed professionals gives me complete peace of mind. Highly recommend!
home.businessDesc: Simplify your team's mobility. Centralized dashboard, consolidated billing, customizable travel policies.
home.citiesTitle: Book a taxi in your city

contact.metaTitle: Contact us - Help, Business demo and taxi driver partnership
contact.metaDescription: Contact our team for a Business demo, to become a licensed partner driver or to get help with your booking. Guaranteed response within 24 hours, Mon-Fri.
contact.subtitle: Contact
contact.title: How can we help you?
contact.intro: Choose a topic below or fill out the contact form directly.
contact.requestDemoDesc: Discover TaxiNeo Business in action with a personalized demonstration.
contact.becomeDriverDesc: Join our network of professional drivers and grow your business.
contact.helpSupportDesc: Have a question about your booking or account? Our team is here to help.
contact.faq1Q: How do I register as a driver?
contact.faq1A: Go to our registration page, fill in the form with your professional details (professional card, insurance, vehicle) and our team will validate your profile within 48 hours.
contact.faq2A: Fares are based on current prefectural regulations. They include the flag fall, price per kilometer and any regulatory surcharges (night, luggage, etc.).
contact.faq3Q: How do I cancel a booking?
contact.faq3A: You can cancel free of charge up to 30 minutes before the scheduled pickup time, directly from your client area or by contacting our support.
contact.faq4Q: What is the support response time?
contact.faq4A: Our team typically responds within 24 hours on business days. For emergencies related to an ongoing ride, use the in-app chat for immediate assistance.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill out the form below, we'll respond within 24 hours.
contact.messageSentDesc: We have received your request and will get back to you as soon as possible.

cities.title: Your taxi anywhere in France
cities.subtitle: TaxiNeo is available in the {count} largest cities in France, spread across 13 regions. Hover over a region to locate it on the map.
cities.metaTitle: Taxi in the 50 largest French cities | Fixed fares 24/7
cities.metaDescription: Book your taxi in the 50 largest French cities. Licensed drivers, regulated fares, available 24/7 across France. Fixed prices, airport and station transfers.
cities.step1Desc: Select your departure city from the 50 largest cities in France covered by our network of professional drivers.
cities.step2Desc: Provide your pick-up address, destination, preferred date and time. Receive a fixed fare instantly.
cities.step3Desc: Your driver is waiting at the specified address. Enjoy a comfortable and safe ride at the pre-agreed fare.
cities.adv1Desc: All our drivers are licensed professionals, trained and with expert knowledge of their city. Safety and comfort guaranteed.
cities.adv2Desc: No surprises on arrival: receive a fixed quote before booking. Our fares are regulated and clearly displayed.
cities.adv3Desc: Day or night, our drivers are available across France. Book in advance or request an immediate pick-up.
cities.adv4Desc: Book online in just a few clicks, no app to download. Instant confirmation by email and SMS.
cities.faqTitle: Frequently asked questions about our taxis in France
cities.faq1Q: In how many cities is TaxiNeo available?
cities.faq1A: TaxiNeo is available in the 50 largest cities in France, across 13 regions. Each city has licensed professional drivers ready to transport you 24/7.
cities.faq2Q: How do I book a taxi in my city?
cities.faq2A: Click on your city on the map, enter your pick-up and drop-off addresses, choose the date and time, then confirm your booking. You'll receive instant confirmation.
cities.faq3Q: Are fares the same in all cities?
cities.faq3A: Fares are regulated by the prefecture and may vary slightly between cities. You always receive a fixed quote before confirming your booking, with no surprises.
cities.faq4Q: Can I book a taxi for a trip between two cities?
cities.faq4A: Yes, TaxiNeo offers long-distance trips between French cities. Simply enter your departure city and destination to get a flat-rate fare.
cities.seoTitle1: Taxis in France: a regulated and reliable transport service
cities.seoText1: In France, taxis are a regulated public transport service. Every taxi driver must hold a professional licence issued by the local prefecture, guaranteeing their training, insurance and compliance with regulated fares. Unlike ride-hailing services (VTC), taxis benefit from dedicated lanes in major cities, designated taxi ranks and the right to pick up passengers on the street. With TaxiNeo, you gain access to this network of licensed professional drivers across the 50 largest cities in France, with the convenience of online booking at a fixed price.
cities.seoTitle2: Taxi fares in France: how does it work?
cities.seoText2: Taxi fares in France are set by prefectural order and regulated by law. They include a pick-up charge (typically between 2 and 4 euros), a per-kilometre rate (between 1.10 and 1.60 euros depending on the time and day) and an hourly waiting rate. Three tariffs apply depending on conditions: tariff A for daytime urban rides, tariff B for night-time or Sunday rides, and tariff C for trips outside the municipality. TaxiNeo simplifies this fare structure by offering you a fixed price before each booking, calculated on the basis of the current regulated fares.
cities.seoText3a: City rides: quick daily trips for your professional, medical or personal appointments. Our drivers know the shortcuts and dedicated lanes to optimise every journey.
cities.seoText3b: Airport and station transfers: home pick-up or arrival pick-up, real-time flight or train tracking, luggage assistance. Special packages for trips to and from France's main airports and stations.
cities.seoText3c: Long distance: travel comfortably between French cities at a negotiated rate. Ideal for business trips or events. Flat-rate fare communicated before departure.
cities.seoText3d: Medical transport: adapted transport to hospitals and clinics with attentive care. Covered by French social security under certain conditions. Vehicles equipped for patient comfort.
cities.faq5A: Yes, our drivers accept pets in most cases. We recommend mentioning this when booking so the driver can prepare the vehicle accordingly.
cities.faq6Q: How can I pay for my TaxiNeo taxi?
cities.faq6A: You can pay for your ride by bank card directly in the taxi, in cash, or by online payment when booking. All our vehicles are equipped with electronic payment terminals.
cities.faq7Q: Can I book a taxi for a medical trip?
cities.faq7A: Yes, TaxiNeo offers a medical transport service covered by French social security. With a medical prescription, your trips to hospitals and clinics can be reimbursed. Contact us to learn more.
cities.faq8A: Absolutely. We offer solutions tailored to businesses: corporate accounts, monthly invoicing, detailed reporting and negotiated rates. Ideal for your employees' and clients' travel needs.
cities.crossLinksDesc: TaxiNeo goes beyond city rides. Explore our specialised transfer services for airports and train stations across France.
cities.crossLinkAirportsDesc: 50 airports, flat-rate fares, flight tracking and meet & greet with name board.
cities.crossLinkStationsDesc: 50 stations, flat-rate fares, train tracking and pick-up at the exit.
cities.ctaDesc: 50 cities, 13 regions, hundreds of professional drivers at your service.

city.service3Desc: A dedicated driver for your appointments, events and evenings out.

airports.title: Airport taxi transfer
airports.subtitle: Fixed fares, real-time flight tracking, meet and greet in the arrivals area. Hover over a region to locate its airports on the map.
airports.metaTitle: Airport Taxi - Fixed-fare transfers to 50 French airports
airports.metaDescription: Book your taxi transfer to and from the 50 main airports in France. Fixed fares, real-time flight tracking, personalised meet and greet. Available 24/7.
airports.howItWorksTitle: How to book your airport transfer
airports.step1Desc: Select your departure or arrival airport from the 50 main French airports covered by our network.
airports.step2Desc: Provide your flight number, destination address and preferred time. Receive a flat-rate fare instantly.
airports.step3Desc: Your driver tracks your flight in real time and meets you with a name board in the arrivals area. Luggage assistance included.
airports.adv1Desc: Our drivers have expert knowledge of every airport's access roads and terminals. They guarantee a fast, stress-free transfer.
airports.adv2Desc: The price is fixed in advance, regardless of traffic or journey time. No hidden charges, even if your flight is delayed.
airports.adv3Desc: We track your flight to adjust the pick-up time. If your flight is delayed or early, your driver adjusts automatically.
airports.adv4Desc: Your driver meets you in the arrivals area with a name board. Luggage assistance and a complimentary bottle of water included.
airports.faqTitle: Frequently asked questions about airport transfers
airports.faq1Q: How does the airport taxi transfer work?
airports.faq1A: Book online by entering your airport, flight number and address. Your driver tracks your flight in real time and meets you at the exit with a name board.
airports.faq2A: Yes, the fare is fixed in advance and does not change, even in case of traffic jams or flight delays. You know the exact price before booking.
airports.faq3Q: What happens if my flight is delayed?
airports.faq3A: We track your flight in real time. Your driver automatically adjusts their arrival time. No extra charge is applied for delays.
airports.faq4Q: Can I book a transfer for a group?
airports.faq4A: Yes, we offer vehicles suited for groups (vans, minibuses). Indicate the number of passengers when booking to receive a tailored quote.
airports.seoTitle1: Airport taxi transfers in France: travel stress-free
airports.seoText1: Every year, over 200 million passengers travel through French airports. Arriving at or departing from the airport can be stressful, especially when dealing with luggage, connections and tight schedules. An airport taxi transfer with TaxiNeo removes that worry: your professional driver tracks your flight in real time, adapts to any delays and meets you with a name board in the arrivals area. No extra charge for flight delays, guaranteed flat-rate fare, luggage assistance included.
airports.seoText1b: Our drivers serve the 50 main airports in France, from major international hubs like Paris-CDG, Orly, Nice-Côte d'Azur and Lyon-Saint Exupéry to regional airports like Nantes-Atlantique, Bordeaux-Mérignac or Strasbourg-Entzheim. Whatever your departure or arrival airport, TaxiNeo guarantees a punctual and comfortable transfer.
airports.seoTitle2: Why choose a taxi over public transport for the airport?
airports.seoText2a: Door-to-door: the taxi picks you up at your home or office and drops you off directly at the terminal, with no connections or extra waiting. Significant time savings, especially with bulky luggage.
airports.seoText2b: Available 24/7: shuttles and public transport don't always run at night or early in the morning. Taxis are available at all hours, 365 days a year, for your early flights or late arrivals.
airports.seoText2c: Comfort and peace of mind: room for your luggage, air conditioning, clean vehicle and professional driver. You arrive at the airport rested and on time, without the stress of crowded transport.
airports.seoText2d: Cost-effective for groups: for 2 to 4 passengers, a taxi is often cheaper than individual shuttle tickets, while offering a much more convenient door-to-door service.
airports.faq5Q: How far in advance should I book an airport transfer?
airports.faq5A: We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance to guarantee availability. However, you can book up to 30 days before your flight. For last-minute bookings, contact us and we'll do our best.
airports.faq6Q: Can the driver help with my luggage?
airports.faq6A: Yes, luggage assistance is included in all our airport transfers. Your driver helps you load and unload your suitcases. For large amounts of luggage, please mention it when booking.
airports.faq7Q: How does the airport meet & greet work?
airports.faq7A: Your driver waits in the arrivals area with a name board. They track your flight in real time and adjust their arrival time accordingly. You receive their contact details by SMS so you can reach them easily.
airports.faq8Q: Do you provide child seats in airport taxis?
airports.faq8A: Yes, on request when booking, we can provide a baby seat, booster seat or both. This service is free of charge and allows families to travel safely.
airports.crossLinksDesc: TaxiNeo covers all your transport needs across France.
airports.crossLinkCitiesDesc: 50 cities, professional drivers, regulated fares and online booking.
airports.crossLinkStationsDesc: 50 stations, flat-rate fares, train tracking and pick-up at the exit.
airports.ctaDesc: 50 airports, flat-rate fares, flight tracking and personalised meet & greet.

stations.title: Train station taxi transfer
stations.subtitle: Fixed fares, real-time train tracking, meet at the station exit. Hover over a region to locate its stations on the map.
stations.metaTitle: Station Taxi - Fixed-fare transfers to 50 French stations
stations.metaDescription: Book your taxi transfer to and from the 50 main train stations in France. Fixed fares, real-time train tracking, personalised meet and greet. Available 24/7.
stations.howItWorksTitle: How to book your station transfer
stations.step1Desc: Select your departure or arrival station from the 50 main French train stations covered by our network.
stations.step2Desc: Provide your train number, destination address and arrival time. Receive a flat-rate fare instantly.
stations.step3Desc: Your driver tracks your train in real time and meets you at the station exit. Luggage assistance included.
stations.adv1Desc: Our drivers have expert knowledge of every station's access points and exits. Fast, stress-free transfer guaranteed.
stations.adv2Desc: The price is fixed in advance and does not change, even in traffic. No meter, no surprises on arrival.
stations.adv3Desc: We track your train to adjust the pick-up time. If your train is delayed, your driver adapts automatically.
stations.adv4Desc: Your driver meets you directly at the station exit. Luggage assistance included for a comfortable transfer.
stations.faqTitle: Frequently asked questions about station transfers
stations.faq1Q: How do I book a taxi from a station?
stations.faq1A: Select your station on the map, enter your destination and arrival time. You'll receive a flat-rate fare and instant confirmation by email.
stations.faq2Q: How much does a taxi transfer from the station cost?
stations.faq2A: The fare depends on the distance between the station and your destination. You receive a flat-rate quote before booking, with no hidden charges.
stations.faq3Q: What happens if my train is delayed?
stations.faq3A: We track your train in real time. Your driver automatically adjusts their arrival time. No extra charge is applied for delays.
stations.faq4Q: Does the driver wait for me at the station exit?
stations.faq4A: Yes, your driver meets you directly at the main exit of the station. They can help you with your luggage to the vehicle.
stations.seoTitle1: Station taxi transfers: the most practical solution
stations.seoText1: Every day, millions of travellers arrive at train stations across France. Whether you're travelling by TGV, Intercités, TER or Ouigo, the last-mile question always arises: how do you get from the station to your home, hotel or meeting? A taxi remains the fastest and most comfortable solution. With TaxiNeo, your driver tracks your train in real time and meets you directly at the station exit, ready to handle your luggage.
stations.seoText1b: Our network covers the 50 main train stations in France: from the major Parisian stations (Gare du Nord, Gare de Lyon, Gare Montparnasse, Gare de l'Est, Gare Saint-Lazare) to regional stations like Lyon Part-Dieu, Marseille Saint-Charles, Bordeaux Saint-Jean, Lille-Flandres or Strasbourg. Flat-rate fares communicated before booking, with no surprises on arrival.
stations.seoTitle2: Taxi vs ride-hailing at the station: what's the difference?
stations.seoText2a: Regulated fares: taxis apply fares set by the prefecture, transparent and regulated by law. Ride-hailing services set their own prices, which can vary with demand (surge pricing).
stations.seoText2b: Priority access: taxis have dedicated ranks directly at station exits, with privileged access. No need to wait for a vehicle in a remote pick-up zone.
stations.seoText2c: Dedicated lanes: in major cities, taxis use bus lanes, significantly reducing journey time, especially during rush hours.
stations.seoText2d: Guaranteed professionalism: taxi drivers hold a professional licence issued by the prefecture, certifying their training, clean criminal record and professional insurance.
stations.faq5Q: Does the driver really track my train in real time?
stations.faq5A: Yes, thanks to our tracking system, your driver knows your train's arrival time in real time. In case of delay, they automatically adjust their pick-up time. No extra charge is applied.
stations.faq6Q: Can I book a taxi for a round trip to the station?
stations.faq6A: Yes, you can book a round trip. Simply enter both journeys when booking. You'll receive a flat-rate fare for each trip, communicated in advance.
stations.faq7Q: Is there an extra charge for bulky luggage?
stations.faq7A: No, luggage assistance is included in all our station transfers. Whether you have one suitcase or several, your driver helps you load them. For exceptional volumes (bicycle, pushchair), mention it when booking.
stations.faq8Q: How do I find my driver at the station?
stations.faq8A: Your driver waits at the main exit of the station. You receive their details (name, phone number, vehicle make and colour) by SMS and email after booking.
stations.crossLinksDesc: TaxiNeo covers all your transport needs across France.
stations.crossLinkCitiesDesc: 50 cities, professional drivers, regulated fares and online booking.
stations.crossLinkAirportsDesc: 50 airports, flat-rate fares, flight tracking and meet & greet with name board.
stations.ctaDesc: 50 stations, flat-rate fares, train tracking and pick-up at the exit.

whyJoin.metaTitle: Become a TaxiNeo Partner Driver — Join for Free Today
whyJoin.metaDescription: Join the TaxiNeo network for free. Online profile, digital business card, booking management and synced calendar. Grow your taxi business and get more clients.
whyJoin.heroTitle: Grow your taxi business with TaxiNeo
whyJoin.heroSubtitle: Join a free network of professional drivers. Get digital tools, online visibility and more rides — at no cost.
whyJoin.advantage1Desc: Get listed on the TaxiNeo platform and receive requests from local clients, tourists and businesses in your area.
whyJoin.advantage2Desc: Get a dedicated page with your reviews, fares, service area and availability. Your digital storefront.
whyJoin.advantage3Desc: Generate a personalized card with QR code, printable as PDF. Clients scan and book directly.
whyJoin.advantage4Desc: A complete dashboard to manage your rides. Accept or decline with one click, track your stats.
whyJoin.advantage5Desc: Export your bookings in iCal format to Google Calendar, Outlook or Apple Calendar automatically.
whyJoin.advantage6Desc: Be part of a verified network of professional drivers. Build credibility with your clients.
whyJoin.toolsTitle: Free digital tools for your business
whyJoin.toolsDesc: TaxiNeo provides all the tools you need to grow and manage your taxi business. Everything is included, at no cost.
whyJoin.tool2: PDF business card with QR code
whyJoin.step1Desc: Create your account in 2 minutes. All you need is an email, your name and your city of activity.
whyJoin.step2Desc: Add your vehicles, coverage area, fares and availability to become visible.
whyJoin.step3Desc: Clients find you on the platform and book directly online. You get notified instantly.
whyJoin.testimonial1: Since joining TaxiNeo, I get 3 to 4 extra rides per week thanks to my online profile. And it's completely free!
whyJoin.testimonial2: The business card with QR code is brilliant. My regular clients keep it and book with a scan. Very professional.
whyJoin.testimonial3: The dashboard lets me manage everything from my phone. Accepting rides, checking my schedule — it's simple and effective.
whyJoin.faqTitle: Everything you need to know before joining TaxiNeo
whyJoin.faq1A: Yes, registration and all tools are 100% free: online profile, business card, dashboard, calendar. A 10% commission only applies to rides sent to you through our website.
whyJoin.faq2A: Your profile appears in TaxiNeo search results when a client looks for a taxi in your area. You're also indexed through your public page optimized for Google.
whyJoin.faq3Q: Do I have to leave my current dispatch?
whyJoin.faq3A: No, you remain fully independent. TaxiNeo complements your existing business. You can continue working with your dispatch or other platforms.
whyJoin.faq4A: To sign up, you just need an email address and your basic information (name, city, vehicle). No official documents required at registration.
whyJoin.faq5A: Your profile is visible immediately after registration. The more complete your profile (photo, bio, fares, availability), the higher you appear in results.
whyJoin.qrSectionTitle: A QR code that works for you
whyJoin.qrSectionDesc: Print your QR code on business cards, your vehicle, or flyers. Clients scan it and instantly access your profile to book a ride.
whyJoin.qrMockConfirmedDesc: The client will receive a confirmation SMS with the ride details.
whyJoin.qrBenefit1Desc: Add your QR code to your cards to turn every exchange into a potential booking.
whyJoin.qrBenefit2Desc: Stick it on your rear window. Interested passers-by scan and book directly.
whyJoin.qrBenefit3Desc: Leave your QR flyers in partner establishments. Bookings 24/7.

sharedRides.metaTitle: Shared Taxi — Save Up to 50% with Pro Drivers | TaxiNeo
sharedRides.metaDescription: Share a taxi with other passengers and save up to 50% on your rides while reducing your carbon footprint. Licensed professional driver guaranteed on every trip.
sharedRides.heroSubtitle: Save up to 50% compared to a solo taxi, and help the planet too. Share your ride with a professional driver.
sharedRides.noResults: No rides available for this search
sharedRides.noResultsDesc: Try different criteria or check back later
sharedRides.joinSuccessDesc: You have joined the ride. The driver has been notified.
sharedRides.noTripsOnDateDesc: Try another day from the calendar above
sharedRides.chooseDepartureFirst: Select a departure to see available dates
sharedRides.proposeDesc: Add a ride and nearby drivers will be notified. The first to accept will become your driver.
sharedRides.loginRequired: Log in to book a seat, offer a ride or create your own shared trip.
sharedRides.proposeSuccessDesc: {count} driver(s) have been notified. You will receive an email once a driver accepts.
sharedRides.coverageSubtitle: 8 pickup points between Paris and Fontainebleau
sharedRides.proposeCommentPlaceholder: E.g., I'm leaving from city hall, I have 2 suitcases...

solutionHotel.metaTitle: TaxiNeo for Hotels — Premium Guest Transport Solution
solutionHotel.metaDescription: Offer a premium taxi service to your hotel guests. Book in 2 clicks, centralized billing, verified professional drivers. Free solution designed for hoteliers.
solutionHotel.heroSubtitle: Offer impeccable transport service to your guests. Instant booking from reception, centralized billing, professional drivers.
solutionHotel.advantage1Desc: Book a taxi for your guests in 2 clicks from your dashboard. They receive an email confirmation with the driver details.
solutionHotel.advantage2Desc: A single monthly statement for all rides. Simplify your accounting and maintain control over transport expenses.
solutionHotel.advantage3Desc: Early checkout or late arrival, our drivers are available at all hours. Your guests are never left without a solution.
solutionHotel.advantage4Desc: Professional drivers, clean vehicles, fares fixed in advance. A service that matches the standard of your establishment.
solutionHotel.advantage5Desc: Receive 5% of the fare for every ride booked through your hotel. An automatic additional revenue stream, effortlessly paid back to your establishment.
solutionHotel.advantage6Desc: All our drivers are licensed professionals. Your guests travel safely and with peace of mind.
solutionHotel.toolsTitle: A free dashboard designed for hospitality
solutionHotel.toolsDesc: Manage your guests' transport from a simple and intuitive interface. Registration, dashboard, bookings, invoicing — everything is 100% free for your hotel.
solutionHotel.step1Desc: Free registration in 2 minutes. Establishment name, main contact, email — that's all.
solutionHotel.step2Desc: Browse available drivers in your area and add them to your favorites for express bookings.
solutionHotel.step3Desc: From your dashboard, book a taxi in a few clicks. The guest receives a confirmation with the driver details.
solutionHotel.testimonial1: Our guests love the service. In 2 clicks from reception, the taxi is booked. No more calling a dispatch center. It's fast and professional.
solutionHotel.testimonial2: Centralized billing has simplified our life. One statement per month instead of dozens of receipts. And the loyalty wallet is a real bonus.
solutionHotel.testimonial3: We have our favorite drivers who know our regular guests well. The service is personalized, exactly what we were looking for.
solutionHotel.faq1Q: Is it free for the hotel?
solutionHotel.faq1A: Yes, registration and dashboard usage are 100% free. Rides are charged at the regulated rate, paid by the guest or the hotel at your discretion.
solutionHotel.faq2A: You receive a detailed monthly statement with all rides. You can also charge each ride to the guest directly via their room.
solutionHotel.faq3Q: Do drivers know the airports and train stations?
solutionHotel.faq3A: Absolutely. Our drivers are licensed professionals who are fully familiar with airport and station transfers and all points of interest in your city.
solutionHotel.faq4A: Yes, you can schedule a ride up to 30 days in advance. Ideal for early checkouts or scheduled airport transfers.
solutionHotel.faq5Q: How many people can use the account?
solutionHotel.faq5A: There's no limit. All reception staff can access the dashboard and book for hotel guests.
solutionHotel.ctaTitle: Offer the best to your guests

solutionHospital.metaTitle: TaxiNeo for Hospitals — Simplified patient transport
solutionHospital.metaDescription: Simplify patient transport at your facility. Quick booking, wheelchair accessibility, centralized billing, trained drivers. Free solution for hospitals.
solutionHospital.heroSubtitle: Organize your patients' travel with peace of mind. Quick booking, wheelchair-accessible vehicles, drivers trained in medical transport.
solutionHospital.advantage1Desc: Our drivers are trained for patient transport. Gentle handling, boarding assistance, respect for medical confidentiality.
solutionHospital.advantage2Desc: Need urgent patient transport? Our drivers are available day and night, including weekends and public holidays.
solutionHospital.advantage3Desc: Vehicles adapted for people with reduced mobility. Wheelchairs, walkers — we accommodate all needs.
solutionHospital.advantage4Desc: Each department can have its own budget. Monthly centralized billing with details per department and per patient.
solutionHospital.advantage5Desc: Schedule transport in advance based on medical appointments. Automatic reminders for both driver and patient.
solutionHospital.advantage6Desc: All our drivers are licensed professionals, trained in first aid and transporting vulnerable individuals.
solutionHospital.toolsDesc: Manage your patients' transport from a simple interface. Schedule, track and invoice per department in one place.
solutionHospital.step1Desc: Free registration in 2 minutes. Facility name, transport service, email — that's all.
solutionHospital.step2Desc: Add your departments (cardiology, oncology, etc.) for separate billing and precise transport tracking.
solutionHospital.step3Desc: From your dashboard, book transport in a few clicks. The patient and driver are notified automatically.
solutionHospital.testimonial1: Patient transport has become much simpler. The drivers are punctual and attentive with our patients. A real added value.
solutionHospital.testimonial2: Per-department billing allows us to track transport costs precisely. The dashboard is clear and easy to use.
solutionHospital.testimonial3: Our wheelchair patients are handled with great care. The drivers are trained and the vehicles adapted. Excellent service.
solutionHospital.faq1Q: Is it free for the facility?
solutionHospital.faq1A: Yes, registration and dashboard usage are 100% free. Rides are charged at the regulated rate, with the option of social security coverage.
solutionHospital.faq2A: Yes, we have vehicles adapted for people with reduced mobility, with access ramps and wheelchair spaces.
solutionHospital.faq3Q: How does social security coverage work?
solutionHospital.faq3A: With a medical transport prescription, rides can be covered by health insurance. We provide the necessary supporting documents.
solutionHospital.faq4Q: Are drivers available at night and on weekends?
solutionHospital.faq4A: Yes, our service operates 24/7, including public holidays. Ideal for emergencies and hospital discharge transport.
solutionHospital.faq5Q: Can we manage multiple departments with one account?
solutionHospital.faq5A: Yes, you can create as many departments as needed. Each department has its own billing and transport tracking.

solutionEnterprise.metaTitle: TaxiNeo for Businesses — Optimize your corporate travel
solutionEnterprise.metaDescription: Take control of your company's transport budget. Centralized billing, multi-user accounts, travel policy management, 5% loyalty wallet. Free setup included.
solutionEnterprise.heroTitle: Take control of your business travel
solutionEnterprise.heroSubtitle: Optimize your company's transport budget. Centralized billing, multi-user management, customizable travel policies.
solutionEnterprise.advantage1Desc: Regulated fares with no surcharges, full visibility on expenses. On average, our business clients save 30% on their transport budget.
solutionEnterprise.advantage2Desc: A single monthly statement for all employees. Simplify accounting and budget tracking for your company.
solutionEnterprise.advantage3Desc: Add as many employees as needed. Each one can book independently while respecting company travel policy.
solutionEnterprise.advantage4Desc: Define your company's travel rules: per-ride limits, authorized zones, schedules. Everything is configurable.
solutionEnterprise.advantage5Desc: Earn 5% credit on every completed ride. Use your wallet to fund additional rides.
solutionEnterprise.advantage6Desc: Licensed professional drivers, insured vehicles, complete traceability of every ride. Your employees travel safely.
solutionEnterprise.toolsDesc: Manage your employees' travel from a clear interface. Book, track and analyze in one place.
solutionEnterprise.step1Desc: Free registration in 2 minutes. Company name, main contact, email — that's all.
solutionEnterprise.step2Desc: Invite your employees to join the company account. Each one gets their own access for booking.
solutionEnterprise.step3Desc: Your employees book independently. You track expenses and receive a detailed monthly statement.
solutionEnterprise.testimonial1: Since using TaxiNeo, we've reduced our transport costs by 25%. Centralized billing saves a huge amount of time for accounting.
solutionEnterprise.testimonial2: Our sales team books independently and I maintain budget visibility. The loyalty wallet is an appreciable bonus.
solutionEnterprise.testimonial3: The configurable travel policy lets us control costs without blocking the teams. Very well designed.
solutionEnterprise.faq1Q: Is it free for the company?
solutionEnterprise.faq1A: Yes, registration and dashboard usage are 100% free. Rides are charged at the regulated rate, with no additional fees.
solutionEnterprise.faq2Q: How many employees can we add?
solutionEnterprise.faq2A: There's no limit. You can add as many employees as needed, each with their own booking access.
solutionEnterprise.faq3A: You have access to a dashboard with statistics for all rides: costs per employee, per period, per destination. CSV export available.
solutionEnterprise.faq4A: Yes, you can configure limits per ride, per employee and per month. Alerts are sent when limits are exceeded.
solutionEnterprise.faq5Q: How does the loyalty wallet work?
solutionEnterprise.faq5A: 5% of each completed ride amount is automatically credited to your company wallet. You can use it to fund future rides.

solutionParticulier.metaTitle: TaxiNeo for Individuals — Your taxi in a few clicks
solutionParticulier.metaDescription: Book your taxi in just 2 minutes. Transparent pricing, save your favorite drivers, earn 5% loyalty rewards, schedule rides in advance. Free registration.
solutionParticulier.heroTitle: Your taxi in a few clicks
solutionParticulier.heroSubtitle: Book a taxi simply, with transparent pricing and trusted drivers. 5% loyalty wallet on every ride.
solutionParticulier.advantage1Desc: Book your taxi in a few clicks from your smartphone or computer. Instant confirmation with driver details.
solutionParticulier.advantage2Desc: Price fixed in advance, no nasty surprises. Regulated fares, same as the meter. You know exactly what you'll pay.
solutionParticulier.advantage3Desc: Save your preferred drivers for easy access. Book in one click with the driver you know and trust.
solutionParticulier.advantage4Desc: Earn 5% credit on every completed ride. Your wallet fills up automatically and you can use it for future rides.
solutionParticulier.advantage5Desc: Need a taxi tomorrow morning? Schedule your rides up to 30 days in advance. Automatic reminder before departure.
solutionParticulier.advantage6Desc: All our drivers are licensed and verified professionals. Insured vehicles, real-time ride tracking.
solutionParticulier.toolsDesc: Manage your rides from your personal space. Book, track your rides and enjoy your loyalty wallet.
solutionParticulier.step1Desc: Free registration in 2 minutes. Name, email, phone — that's all you need.
solutionParticulier.step2Desc: Enter your destination and discover available drivers nearby. Compare fares and choose.
solutionParticulier.step3Desc: Confirm your ride and track your driver's arrival in real time. Simple and secure payment.
solutionParticulier.testimonial1: Super convenient for my daily trips. The loyalty wallet is a real plus — it motivates me to use TaxiNeo for all my rides.
solutionParticulier.testimonial2: I have my favorite drivers that I can find easily. They know my habits and the ride is always pleasant. I recommend it!
solutionParticulier.testimonial3: Advance scheduling is great for my appointments. I book the night before and the driver is there on time. Simple and reliable.
solutionParticulier.faq1A: Yes, registration and use of TaxiNeo are 100% free. You only pay for your rides, at the regulated rate.
solutionParticulier.faq2Q: How does the loyalty wallet work?
solutionParticulier.faq2A: 5% of each completed ride amount is automatically credited to your wallet. You can use this credit for your next rides.
solutionParticulier.faq3A: Yes, you can cancel free of charge up to 30 minutes before the scheduled pickup time.
solutionParticulier.faq4Q: How do I pay for my ride?
solutionParticulier.faq4A: Payment is made directly to the driver, by card or cash. The fare is fixed in advance, no surprises.
solutionParticulier.faq5Q: Is TaxiNeo available in my city?
solutionParticulier.faq5A: TaxiNeo is available in over 50 cities across France. Check our homepage to verify availability in your city.
solutionParticulier.ctaSubtitle: Free registration — first ride in 2 minutes

solutionMiseADispo.metaTitle: Chauffeur Service — Premium B2B Vehicle Hire | TaxiNeo
solutionMiseADispo.metaDescription: Hire a premium chauffeur-driven vehicle for your business needs and events. Choose from sedans, SUVs and VIP vans. Professional drivers available 24/7.
solutionMiseADispo.heroTitle: A chauffeur-driven vehicle at your disposal
solutionMiseADispo.heroSubtitle: A bespoke service for your professional travel. Premium vehicles, exceptional chauffeurs, total availability.
solutionMiseADispo.fleet1Models: Mercedes E-Class, BMW 5 Series, Audi A6
solutionMiseADispo.fleet2Models: Mercedes GLE, BMW X5, Audi Q7
solutionMiseADispo.pricingNote: Prices excl. VAT, tolls and parking not included. Mileage included within a 50 km radius.
solutionMiseADispo.service1Desc: Personalised meet & greet in arrivals, real-time flight tracking, luggage assistance.
solutionMiseADispo.service2Desc: Galas, ceremonies, corporate events. Vehicle at your disposal all evening.
solutionMiseADispo.service3Desc: Chain your business meetings with a dedicated chauffeur who optimises your routes.
solutionMiseADispo.service4Desc: Transport for colleagues and guests for your seminars and team buildings.
solutionMiseADispo.service5Desc: Decorated vehicle, chauffeur in formal attire, impeccable service for your big day.
solutionMiseADispo.service6Desc: Discover the region with a chauffeur-guide. Personalised itineraries.
solutionMiseADispo.advantagesTitle: Excellence at the service of your travel
solutionMiseADispo.advantage1Desc: All our chauffeurs are trained in VIP service: discretion, punctuality, mastery of professional etiquette.
solutionMiseADispo.advantage2Desc: Systematic arrival 10 minutes early. Real-time tracking and direct communication.
solutionMiseADispo.advantage3Desc: Recent fleet, maintained and checked daily. Impeccable interior for every service.
solutionMiseADispo.advantage4Desc: Detailed monthly invoice, cost centres, accounting export. Compatible with your internal management.
solutionMiseADispo.advantage5Desc: NDA available, privacy partition in select vehicles. Your professional life stays private.
solutionMiseADispo.advantage6Desc: Every service is tailored to your needs: route, equipment, duration, number of vehicles.
solutionMiseADispo.step1Desc: Date, duration, vehicle type, number of passengers. Specify your requirements for a personalised quote.
solutionMiseADispo.step2Desc: Within 2 hours, receive a detailed quote with the proposed vehicle and chauffeur. No commitment.
solutionMiseADispo.step3Desc: Your chauffeur awaits at the agreed time and place. Flexible service throughout the booking.
solutionMiseADispo.testimonial1: We use TaxiNeo for all our roadshows. The chauffeurs are impeccable, the vehicles always perfect. A true trusted partner.
solutionMiseADispo.testimonial2: For our quarterly seminars, transport logistics are crucial. TaxiNeo handles everything from A to Z, with remarkable flexibility.
solutionMiseADispo.testimonial3: The chauffeur service for our international clients is exemplary. Airport meet & greet, transfers, total availability. Our clients are always impressed.
solutionMiseADispo.faq1Q: What is the minimum booking duration?
solutionMiseADispo.faq1A: The minimum duration is one hour. For recurring bookings, we offer half-day and full-day packages at preferential rates.
solutionMiseADispo.faq2Q: Is the same chauffeur assigned all day?
solutionMiseADispo.faq2A: Yes, a dedicated chauffeur is assigned for the entire duration of the service. They remain at your disposal between trips.
solutionMiseADispo.faq3Q: Can the itinerary be changed during the service?
solutionMiseADispo.faq3A: Absolutely. The chauffeur service is fully flexible. You can add or modify stops at any time.
solutionMiseADispo.faq4A: You receive a detailed monthly invoice. Payment by bank transfer or direct debit. Option to create cost centres for your accounting.
solutionMiseADispo.faq5A: Yes, we offer framework agreements with preferential rates for businesses with regular needs. Contact us for a personalised quote.

howItWorksPage.metaTitle: How it works - Fixed-price taxi and shared taxi | TaxiNeo
howItWorksPage.metaDescription: Discover how our two mobility solutions work: guaranteed fixed-price taxi booking and affordable shared taxi rides. Simple, transparent and accessible for all.
howItWorksPage.heroSubtitle: Discover our two mobility solutions, simple and transparent.
howItWorksPage.fixedDesc: Book a taxi with a guaranteed fare before departure. No meter, no surprises: you know the exact price from the moment you book.
howItWorksPage.fixedStep1Desc: Enter your pickup and destination. The price is displayed instantly, guaranteed and final.
howItWorksPage.fixedStep2Desc: No meter, no surprises. The fare stays the same regardless of traffic or detours.
howItWorksPage.fixedStep3Desc: A professional licensed taxi driver picks you up. Real-time tracking, automatic payment.
howItWorksPage.poolDesc: Share a ride with other passengers to reduce cost and carbon footprint. Perfect for airport-to-city trips.
howItWorksPage.poolStep1Desc: Select your pickup point on the interactive map or from the list of available rides.
howItWorksPage.poolStep2Desc: Browse available rides by date and destination. Filter by your schedule.
howItWorksPage.poolStep3Desc: Book a seat on an existing ride or post your own request to find fellow passengers.
howItWorksPage.faq1Q: How is the fixed price calculated?
howItWorksPage.faq1A: The price is automatically calculated based on distance, estimated time and regulated fares. It is guaranteed at booking and never changes, even in traffic.
howItWorksPage.faq2A: Yes, all rides are operated by licensed professional taxi drivers. Each passenger is identified and the ride is tracked in real time.
howItWorksPage.faq3A: Yes, you can cancel for free up to 30 minutes before the scheduled pickup time, for both fixed-price and shared taxi.
howItWorksPage.faq4Q: How do I pay for my ride?
howItWorksPage.faq4A: Payment is automatic via the app. You can use a credit card, Apple Pay or Google Pay. A receipt is sent to you by email.
howItWorksPage.faq5Q: What is the difference with a ride-hailing service?
howItWorksPage.faq5A: Our drivers are professional taxis licensed by the prefecture. They have access to dedicated bus lanes and apply government-regulated fares, with no surge pricing.
howItWorksPage.ctaSubtitle: Choose the solution that suits you and book in seconds.
